items.definition_en: A thermometer is a tool that measures temperature.
items.example_en: The nurse used a thermometer to check my fever.

items.definition_en: A stethoscope is used by doctors to listen to the heart or lungs.
items.example_en: The doctor put the stethoscope on my chest.

items.definition_en: A bandage is used to cover and protect a wound.
items.example_en: The nurse wrapped a bandage around my arm.

items.definition_en: A crutch helps people walk if their leg is hurt.
items.example_en: He used a crutch after breaking his leg.

items.definition_en: A wheelchair helps people move if they cannot walk.
items.example_en: She uses a wheelchair after her accident.

items.definition_en: A syringe is used to give medicine with a needle.
items.example_en: The nurse filled the syringe with medicine.

items.definition_en: A plaster covers small cuts or injuries.
items.example_en: She put a plaster on her finger.

items.definition_en: A mask is worn over the nose and mouth to stop disease spread.
items.example_en: Everyone wore a mask in the hospital.

items.definition_en: A glove is used to cover hands for protection.
items.example_en: The doctor put on a glove before the exam.

items.definition_en: Scissors are used to cut bandages and other items.
items.example_en: The nurse cut the bandage with scissors.

items.definition_en: A cane is used to help people walk.
items.example_en: He uses a cane to move around.

items.definition_en: A gown is a loose piece of clothing worn by patients or doctors.
items.example_en: The doctor wore a gown during the surgery.

items.definition_en: A bedpan is used by sick people to go to the toilet in bed.
items.example_en: The nurse brought a bedpan for the patient.

items.definition_en: A blood pressure cuff is used to measure blood pressure.
items.example_en: She put the blood pressure cuff on my arm.

items.definition_en: A medicine cup is a small cup for holding liquid medicine.
items.example_en: He poured syrup into the medicine cup.

items.definition_en: A walker helps people walk if they are weak or hurt.
items.example_en: She uses a walker after her hip surgery.

items.definition_en: An inhaler is a small device used for breathing medicine.
items.example_en: He uses an inhaler for his asthma.

items.definition_en: A drip is a tool for giving medicine slowly into the body.
items.example_en: The patient has a drip in her arm.

items.definition_en: An oxygen mask helps people breathe better by giving oxygen.
items.example_en: The nurse put an oxygen mask on the patient.

items.definition_en: A thermometer strip is a thin strip to check body temperature.
items.example_en: She used a thermometer strip for the child.
